project.title: Aurora A phosphorylates PKM2 at T45.
project.projectDescription: Flag-PKM2 was expressed in H1299 cells. Then the H1299 cells were treated with DMSO or 100nM MLN8237. Then, cell lysate was incubated with anti-Flag M2-agarose. Elutes were separated with 10% SDS-PAGE. The gel was stained with Coomassie Brilliant Blue. Visualized bands were excised and subjected to LC-MS/MS analysis. Then the phosphorylation sites of PKM2 were identified.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Cell lysate was incubated with anti-Flag M2-agarose (Sigma, St Louis, MO, USA) for 2 hours at 4 °C; the beads were washed three times with TBS (50 mM Tris-HCl, 150 mM NaCl, pH 7.4), and the Flag-tagged proteins were eluted by Flag peptides (bank peptide, Hefei, China). Each eluted sample were mixed with 5x loading buffer respectively and boiled for 5 min. The proteins were separated on 10% SDS-PAGE gel. Protein bands were visualized by Coomassie Blue R-250 staining. For digestion, the visible bands were cut down, destained with 30% ACN/100 mM NH4HCO3 until the gels were destained. The gels were dried in a vacuum centrifuge. The in-gel proteins were reduced with dithiothreitol (10 mM DTT/ 100 mM NH4HCO3 ) for 30 min at 56°C, then alkylated with iodoacetamide (30 mM IAA) in the dark at room temperature for 30 minutes. After the above process, 2 µg of Trypsin (Promega, V511A) was added to sample for overnight digestion at 37°C. After digestion, the peptide sample was desalted and analyzed with Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer equipped with Easy-nanoLC 1200.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The raw file was analyzed with pFind Studio 3.The human database was from Uniprot (Proteome ID: UP000005640). Phosphorylation (S/T, +79.9663Da) and Oxidation (M, +15.9949Da) modification were included as variable modification. Carbamidomethyl (C, +57.0215Da) was set as fix modification.
